findings.message: New Redis scrape job added with no corresponding alert rules or dashboard. The postgres job has postgres_alerts.yml, but no redis_alerts.yml exists. A new production scrape target must have observability coverage (alerts + dashboard).
findings.suggestion: Create infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml with alert rules for Redis (e.g., RedisDown, HighMemoryUsage, etc.) and add a corresponding Redis dashboard to infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/redis_dashboard.json
